ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the league was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the event belongs to */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., shot, free throw, substitution) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team involved in the event */,
  "event_desc" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game event the shot belongs to */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., jump shot, layup, free throw) */,
  "shot_location_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the shot location */,
  "shot_location_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the shot location */,
  "shot_made" INTEGER /* Whether the shot was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_throws" (
  "free_throw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each free throw */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game event the free throw belongs to */,
  "free_throw_made" INTEGER /* Whether the free throw was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("free_throw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_throws_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substitutions" (
  "substitution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substitution */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game event the substitution belongs to */,
  "player_in_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player entering the game */,
  "player_out_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player leaving the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substitution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substitutions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "possessions" (
  "possession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each possession */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game event the possession belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team in possession of the ball */,
  "possession_length" REAL /* Length of the possession in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("possession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_possessions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "player_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game stat */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the stat belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the stat belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "team_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team game stat */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the stat belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the stat belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the team */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the team */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the team */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the team */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the team */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the team */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_game_data, edit_team_roster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_box_scores" (
  "game_box_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game box score */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the box score belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the box score belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_box_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_box_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_box_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
